PAINTER-STRIKING_STROKE.title: Striking Stroke

PAINTER-NEO_NEUTRALIZE.title: Neo Neutralize
PAINTER-DARKEN_DRAWING.title: Darken Drawing
PAINTER-AQUA_ANNOYANCE.title: Aqua Annoyance
PAINTER-CANVAS_CATAPULT.title: Canvas Catapult
PAINTER-CANVAS_CATAPULT.description: Deal !D! damage. NL Exhaust a random card from your hand.
PAINTER-CLEAR_CHROMA.title: Clear Chroma
PAINTER-CLEAR_CHROMA.description: Clear: Paint 2 random Colors. NL Chromatic: Paint 1 more of each.
PAINTER-COLOR_COPY.title: Color Copy
PAINTER-COLOR_COPY.description: Paint 1 of a Color on your Canvas.
PAINTER-COLORFUL_CLOBBER.title: Colorful Clobber
PAINTER-COLORFUL_CLOBBER.description: Deal !D! damage. NL Clear: Paint !paint! random Colors.
PAINTER-CONTRASTING_CALM.title: Contrasting Calm
PAINTER-CONTRASTING_CALM.description: Deal !D! damage. NL Paint 1 Blue. Paint 1 Green.
PAINTER-CONTRASTING_CLASH.title: Contrasting Clash
PAINTER-CONTRASTING_CLASH.description: Draw !draw! card(s). NL Paint 1 Red. Paint 1 Blue.
PAINTER-CONTRASTING_CRUSH.title: Contrasting Crush
PAINTER-CONTRASTING_CRUSH.description: Gain !B! Block. NL Paint 1 Red. Paint 1 Green.
PAINTER-CRUSHING_CANVAS.title: Crushing Canvas
PAINTER-CRUSHING_CANVAS.description: Deal !D! damage for each Painting card in your deck.
PAINTER-CURSED_CLASH.title: Cursed Clash
PAINTER-DOUBLE_DRAW.title: Double Draw
PAINTER-DOUBLE_DRAW.description: Deal !D! damage twice. NL Put a random Painting from your discard into your hand.
PAINTER-GRUMPY_GRAFFITI.title: Grumpy Graffiti
PAINTER-GRUMPY_GRAFFITI.description: Deal !D! damage. NL Paint 1 Gray. NL Chromatic: Don't paint it.
PAINTER-ICONIC_IDEA.title: Iconic Idea
PAINTER-INDIGO_INCAPITATION.title: Indigo Incapitation
PAINTER-INDIGO_INCAPITATION.description: Apply !weak! Weak to ALL enemies. NL Clear: Paint !paint! Blue.
PAINTER-MAGENTA_MADNESS.title: Magenta Madness
PAINTER-PLAYFUL_PURPLE.title: Playful Purple
PAINTER-PLAYFUL_PURPLE.description: Paint !paint! Purple. NL Paint 1 extra Purple for each Cursed enemy.
PAINTER-PRISMATIC_PIERCE.title: Prismatic Pierce
PAINTER-PRISMATIC_PIERCE.description: Deal !D! damage and draw 1 card for each Color on the Canvas.
PAINTER-RED_RAZZING.title: Red Razzing
PAINTER-RED_RAZZING.description: Apply !vuln! Vulnerable to ALL enemies. NL Clear: Paint !paint! Red.
PAINTER-SHINY_SHIV.title: Shiny Shiv
PAINTER-SHINY_SHIV.description: Deal !D! damage. NL Clear: Paint 1 Rainbow.
PAINTER-SUPERB_SCHOOLING.title: Superb Schooling
PAINTER-SUPERB_SCHOOLING.description: Gain !B! Block. NL Chromatic: Draw !draw! card(s).
PAINTER-VIBRANT_VISION.title: Vibrant Vision
PAINTER-VIBRANT_VISION.description: Paint 1 random Color. NL Draw !draw! card(s).
PAINTER-ACCURSED_AGGRESSION.title: Accursed Aggression
PAINTER-AMBER_ATTACK.title: Amber Attack
PAINTER-AMBER_ATTACK.description: Deal !D! damage. NL Clear: Paint !paint! Yellow.
PAINTER-ARDENT_AQUA.title: Ardent Aqua
PAINTER-ARDENT_AQUA.description: Paint !paint! Blue. NL Gain !dex! Dexterity. NL Exhaust.
PAINTER-BLANK_BANE.title: Blank Bane
PAINTER-BLANK_BANE.description: Apply !cursed! Cursed to ALL enemies. NL Clear: Add a Gray Gloom into your hand.
PAINTER-BLOOD_BRUSH.title: Blood Brush
PAINTER-BLUE_BURST.title: Blue Burst
PAINTER-BOBS_BIN.title: Bob's Bin
PAINTER-BOBS_BIN.description: Exhaust a Painting in your hand to Paint its colors on the Canvas.
PAINTER-CHOSEN_COLORS.title: Chosen Colors
PAINTER-CHOSEN_COLORS.description: Chromatic: Add a copy of the Canvas into your hand.
PAINTER-CHROMA_CRASH.title: Chroma Crash
PAINTER-CHROMA_CRASH.description: Deal !D! damage. NL Chromatic: Gain 1 Energy and draw 1 card.
PAINTER-COLORED_COLLISION.title: Colored Collision
PAINTER-COLORED_COLLISION.description: Deal !D! damage. NL Chromatic: Gain Energy.
PAINTER-DARK_DUEL.title: Dark Duel
PAINTER-DARK_DUEL.description: Deal !D! damage. NL Chromatic: Darken the Canvas.
PAINTER-DARKER_DANGER.title: Darker Danger
PAINTER-DARKER_DANGER.description: Gain !B! Block. NL Clear: Darken the Canvas.
PAINTER-DEEP_DESPERATION.title: Deep Desperation
PAINTER-DEEP_DESPERATION.description: Paint !paint! Purple. NL Paint 1 additional Purple for ALL your Status and Curse cards.
PAINTER-DOUBLE_DEMOLITION.title: Double Demolition
PAINTER-DOUBLE_DEMOLITION.description: Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies twice. NL Chromatic: Paint 1 more of both Colors.
PAINTER-DUAL_DASH.title: Dual Dash
PAINTER-DUAL_DASH.description: Gain !B! Block. NL Chromatic: Apply 1 Weak to ALL enemies.
PAINTER-DUAL_DEBUFFS.title: Dual Debuffs
PAINTER-ENDING_EFFORT.title: Ending Effort
PAINTER-ENDING_EFFORT.description: Paint !paint! Yellow. NL End your turn.
PAINTER-ENJOYED_EPIPHANY.title: Enjoyed Epiphany
PAINTER-ENJOYED_EPIPHANY.description: Add a random card which Paints a specific Color into your hand. It costs 0 this turn. NL Exhaust.
PAINTER-GREEN_GREED.title: Green Greed
PAINTER-GROWING_GREENS.title: Growing Greens
PAINTER-HELPING_HARSH.title: Helping Harsh
PAINTER-HELPING_HARSH.description: Deal !D! damage. NL Choose a Color to Paint between Red, Blue, Green and Purple.
PAINTER-HUE_HUFFER.title: Hue Huffer
PAINTER-INNOVATIVE_INK.title: Innovative Ink
PAINTER-INNOVATIVE_INK.description: Take 1 damage. NL Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies. NL Paint 1 Red for each damaged target.
PAINTER-INSANE_INSPIRATION.title: Insane Inspiration
PAINTER-INSANE_INSPIRATION.description: Play the top card of your draw pile. If it's a Painting, repeat this effect.
PAINTER-MANY_MINDS.title: Many Minds
PAINTER-MANY_MINDS.description: Clear: Shuffle your discard pile into your draw pile. NL Draw !draw! card(s). NL Chromatic: Exhaust 1 card.
PAINTER-MEAN_MAGENTA.title: Mean Magenta
PAINTER-MEAN_MAGENTA.description: Paint !paint! Red. NL Gain !str! Strength. NL Exhaust.
PAINTER-PAINTBALL_PELT.title: Paintball Pelt
PAINTER-PAINTBRUSH_PANIC.title: Paintbrush Panic
PAINTER-PAINTBRUSH_PANIC.description: Paint X random Colors. NL Paint X Rainbow.
PAINTER-PALETTE_PICK.title: Palette Pick
PAINTER-PALETTE_PICK.description: Choose a Color to Paint !paint! times. NL Exhaust if you chose Yellow.
PAINTER-PURPLE_PAIN.title: Purple Pain
PAINTER-RAINBOW_RAZOR.title: Rainbow Razor
PAINTER-RAINBOW_REALITY.title: Rainbow Reality
PAINTER-RAINBOW_REALITY.description: Paint !paint! Rainbow. NL Clear: Paint 2 extra Rainbow.
PAINTER-RARING_REPAINT.title: Raring Repaint
PAINTER-RARING_REPAINT.description: Gain !B! Block. NL Put a random Painting from your discard into your hand.
PAINTER-RED_RAGE.title: Red Rage
PAINTER-SAFE_SPACE.title: Safe Space
PAINTER-SAFE_SPACE.description: Deal !D! damage. NL Paint 1 Blue for each enemy in combat.
PAINTER-SATANIC_SURGE.title: Satanic Surge
PAINTER-SATANIC_SURGE.description: Apply !cursed! Cursed. NL Cursed on target is not reduced at start of next turn.
PAINTER-SIDE_SCULPTURE.title: Side Sculpture
PAINTER-SIDE_SCULPTURE.description: Create a Painting into your hand.
PAINTER-SIMPLE_STUDIES.title: Simple Studies
PAINTER-SIMPLE_STUDIES.description: Gain !B! Block. NL Chromatic: Shuffle a copy of the Canvas into your draw pile.
PAINTER-SOFT_STIMULATION.title: Soft Stimulation
PAINTER-SOFT_STIMULATION.description: Paint !paint! Green. NL Reduced by 1 for each Color on the Canvas.
PAINTER-SWEEPING_SADNESS.title: Sweeping Sadness
PAINTER-SWEEPING_SADNESS.description: Gain !B! Block. NL Apply !cursed! Cursed to ALL enemies. NL Add a Gray Gloom into your hand.
PAINTER-TREASURE_TROVE.title: Treasure Trove
PAINTER-VIVACIOUS_VIRESCENCE.title: Vivacious Virescence
PAINTER-WATERCOLOR_WAVE.title: Watercolor Wave
PAINTER-WATERCOLOR_WAVE.description: Deal !D! damage. NL Draw !draw! card(s). Discard all cards drawn this way that aren't Paintings.
PAINTER-YELLOW_YEARNING.title: Yellow Yearning
PAINTER-YELLOW_YEARNING.description: Gain Energy. NL Paint !paint! Yellow. NL Exhaust.
PAINTER-ABSTRUSE_ABSTRACT.title: Abstruse Abstract
PAINTER-ABSTRUSE_ABSTRACT.description: Add a copy of the Canvas into your hand. NL Exhaust.
PAINTER-AQUAMARINE_APOSEMATISM.title: Aquamarine Aposematism
PAINTER-AQUAMARINE_APOSEMATISM.descripti: Apply !weak! Weak to ALL enemies. NL Paint !paint! Aqua. NL Exhaust.
PAINTER-BANEFUL_BUCKET.title: Baneful Bucket
PAINTER-BANEFUL_BUCKET.description: Chromatic: Double the amount of Paint on the Canvas. NL Exhaust.
PAINTER-CERULEAN_COVERAGE.title: Cerulean Coverage
PAINTER-CERULEAN_COVERAGE.description: Gain !B! Block. NL Paint !paint! Blue. NL Exhaust.
PAINTER-CHISELED_CHIAROSCURO.title: Chiseled Chiaroscuro
PAINTER-CHISELED_CHIAROSCURO.description: Darken the Canvas X times. NL Exhaust.
PAINTER-CONTRASTING_COOP.title: Contrasting Coop
PAINTER-CONTRASTING_COOP.description: Paint 1 Red. Paint 1 Blue. Paint 1 Green.
PAINTER-DIRE_DESTRUCTION.title: Dire Destruction
PAINTER-DIRE_DESTRUCTION.description: Exhaust ALL your Paintings. NL Deal !dmgPer! damage to a random enemy for each Painting Exhausted.
PAINTER-DUPLICATE_DRAWING.title: Duplicate Drawing
PAINTER-EMPTY_EGO.title: Empty Ego
PAINTER-EMPTY_EGO.description: Clear: Choose and Paint !paint! different Colors.
PAINTER-FANTASY_FORM.title: Fantasy Form
PAINTER-FUSCHIA_FUGUE.title: Fuschia Fugue
PAINTER-FUSCHIA_FUGUE.description: Apply !vuln! Vulnerable to ALL enemies. NL Paint !paint! Magenta. NL Exhaust.
PAINTER-GLORIOUS_GALLERY.title: Glorious Gallery
PAINTER-GLORIOUS_GALLERY.description: Put all Paintings from your draw pile and discard pile into your hand. NL Exhaust.
PAINTER-INDIA_INK.title: India Ink
PAINTER-INDIA_INK.description: Gain Energy. NL Darken the Canvas. NL Exhaust.
PAINTER-MYSTIC_MASTERPIECE.title: Mystic Masterpiece
PAINTER-MYSTIC_MASTERPIECE.description: Permanently add a Painting based on the Canvas to your deck. NL Ethereal.
PAINTER-PAINT_PROFUSION.title: Paint Profusion
PAINTER-POLLOCKS_POTLUCK.title: Pollock's Potluck
PAINTER-POLLOCKS_POTLUCK.description: Paint 1 of each Color. NL Exhaust.
PAINTER-PURPLE_PURPOSE.title: Purple Purpose
PAINTER-PURPLE_PURPOSE.description: Apply !cursed! Cursed to ALL enemies. NL Paint !paint! Purple. NL Exhaust.
PAINTER-RUBY_REAPER.title: Ruby Reaper
PAINTER-RUBY_REAPER.description: Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies. NL Paint !paint! Red. NL Exhaust.
PAINTER-VERDANT_VAINGLORY.title: Verdant Vainglory
PAINTER-VERDANT_VAINGLORY.description: Draw cards until your hand is full. NL Paint !paint! Green. NL Exhaust.
PAINTER-YELLOW_YOWLING.title: Yellow Yowling
PAINTER-YELLOW_YOWLING.description: Paint !gray! Gray. NL Paint !yellow! Yellow. NL Exhaust.
